response.objective_caption: A person's face in profile is visible within deep red light, positioned near the center-left of the frame, while dark blue and black vertical forms occupy the right side against a shadowed background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person's face in profile is nearly obliterated by extreme motion blur and dissolved texture, lost within an oppressive field of deep red light that generates an atmosphere of dread and unease; dark blue and black vertical forms along the right edge remain indistinct, reinforcing the abstract, non-representational quality of the image.
